subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison; verily it draweth thee nigh unto God, the Lord of the mighty Throne. We testify that thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه یقربک الی الله رب العرش العظیم نشهد انک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @high station of the true believer, @suffering and imprisonment, @naming of children; of individuals
